description: Same deterministic Markdown tree as IDX-D, with a REAL gpt-4o-generated summary for every node (--summary-token-threshold 0 disables the verbatim-copy branch that affected IDX-C/IDX-O; see reports/findings-summary-threshold.md).

generation.model_note: --model MUST be passed explicitly: run_pageindex.py forwards model=None into ConfigLoader.load, whose dict merge lets None override the config.yaml default (vendor/PageIndex/pageindex/utils.py ConfigLoader.load). Discovered when threshold 0 sent every node to the LLM.

summary_stats.verbatim_share: 0/339 (0.0%) — vs 273/339 (80.5%) in IDX-C; summary==text check per reports/findings-summary-threshold.md

structure_tokens_no_text.method: tiktoken gpt-4o encoding of json.dumps(indent=2) with 'text' stripped (the field upstream retrieve.py removes); same method gives IDX-D 11,609 / IDX-C 47,793 / IDX-O 47,311
